lines.gurmukhi: ਉਸਤਤਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇਰੀਆ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਸਾਧ ਜਨਾ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਭਗਵਾਨ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ausatat kareh prabh tereea mil saadhoo saadh janaa gur satiguroo bhagavaan |1|
lines.english: They sing Your Praises, God, meeting with the Holy, the Holy people, and the Guru, the True Guru, O Lord God. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਜਨ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਇਕ ਚਿਤਿ ਤੇ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: tere jan dhiaaveh ik man ik chit te saadhoo sukh paaveh jap har har naam nidhaan |
lines.english: Your humble servants focus their consciousness and meditate on You with one-pointed mind; those Holy beings find peace, chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, the Treasure of Bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਤੂ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਤੇ ਸੁਖ ਫਲ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਤੇ ਤਰੇ ਭਵ ਸਿੰਧੁ ਤੇ ਭਗਤ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: jin kai hiradai too suaamee te sukh fal paaveh te tare bhav sindh te bhagat har jaan |
lines.english: They alone obtain the fruit of peace, within whose hearts You, O my Lord and Master, abide. They cross over the terrifying world-ocean - they are known as the Lord's devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਸੇਵਾ ਹਮ ਲਾਇ ਹਰੇ ਹਮ ਲਾਇ ਹਰੇ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੇ ਹਰਿ ਤੂ ਤੂ ਤੂ ਤੂ ਤੂ ਭਗਵਾਨ ॥੨॥੬॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: tin sevaa ham laae hare ham laae hare jan naanak ke har too too too too too bhagavaan |2|6|12|
lines.english: Please enjoin me to their service, Lord, please enjoin me to their service. O Lord God, You, You, You, You, You are the Lord of servant Nanak. ||2||6||12||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl, Second House:
Sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the World, the Treasure of Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਬਿਦਾਰਨ ਸੁਖਦਾਤੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਭੇਟਤ ਹੋਇ ਸਗਲ ਸਿਧਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dukh bidaaran sukhadaate satigur jaa kau bhettat hoe sagal sidh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The True Guru is the Destroyer of pain, the Giver of peace; meeting Him, one is totally fulfilled. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਚੀਤਿ ਆਵੈ ਗੁਰੁ ਅਪਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau cheet aavai gur apanaa |
lines.english: Whoever remembers his Guru,
Millions of sinners are carried across in an instant. ||1||
Meditate in remembrance on the Naam, the Support of the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕਉ ਦੂਖੁ ਨਹੀ ਤਿਲੁ ਸੁਪਨਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: taa kau dookh nahee til supanaa |2|
lines.english: shall not suffer sorrow, even in dreams. ||2||
Whoever keeps his Guru enshrined within

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਰਸਨਾ ਚਾਖੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: so jan har ras rasanaa chaakhai |3|
lines.english: - that humble being tastes the sublime essence of the Lord with his tongue. ||3||
Says Nanak, the Guru has been Kind to me;
here and herafter, my face is radiant. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਠਤ ਬੈਠਤ ਸੋਵਤ ਜਾਗਤ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਨੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aootthat baitthat sovat jaagat saas saas saas har japane |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Standing up and sitting down, while sleeping and awake, with each and every breath, I meditate on the Lord. ||1||Pause||
I worship and adore You, my Lord and Master.
Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:
The Naam, the Name of the Lord, abides within the hearts of those,
Peace and tranquility come into the hearts of those
whose Lord and Master blesses them with this gift. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਨ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naam mantru jaa kau gur deen |3|
lines.english: are wise, and blessed with all powers. ||3||
Those whom the Guru blesses with the Mantra of the Naam
who meet their Lord and Master, through the Word of the Guru. ||2||
who are blessed with the Name in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga. ||4||2||
Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak taa kai bal jaau |
lines.english: Says Nanak, I am a sacrifice to those

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਰਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਗਾਉ ਮੇਰੀ ਰਸਨਾਂ ॥
lines.translit: keerat prabh kee gaau meree rasanaan |
lines.english: Sing the Praises of God, O my tongue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਬਾਰ ਕਰਿ ਬੰਦਨ ਸੰਤਨ ਊਹਾਂ ਚਰਨ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਜੀ ਕੇ ਬਸਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anik baar kar bandan santan aoohaan charan gobind jee ke basanaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Humbly bow to the Saints, over and over again; through them, the Feet of the Lord of the Universe shall come to abide within you. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਭਾਂਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੁਆਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: anik bhaant kar duaar na paavau |
lines.english: The Door to the Lord cannot be found by any other means.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਹ ਨ ਸੋਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: kott karam kar deh na sodhaa |
lines.english: The body is not purified by millions of rituals.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਤ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਵਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hoe kripaal ta har har dhiaavau |1|
lines.english: When He becomes Merciful, we come to meditate on the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||
Chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, total peace is found. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨ ਨ ਬੂਝੀ ਬਹੁ ਰੰਗ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: trisan na boojhee bahu rang maaeaa |
lines.english: Thirst and desire are not quenched by enjoying the many pleasures of Maya.
The mind is awakened and enlightened only in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||2||
says Nanak, then one is rid of worldly entanglements. ||4||3||
When the Supreme Lord God becomes Merciful,
Beg for such blessings from the Lord of the Universe:
Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਟਹਲ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੀ ਸੰਗੁ ਸਾਧੂ ਕਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾਂ ਜਪਿ ਪਰਮ ਗਤੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ttehal santan kee sang saadhoo kaa har naamaan jap param gate |1| rahaau |
lines.english: to work for the Saints, and the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. Chanting the Name of the Lord, the supreme status is obtained. ||1||Pause||
Worship the Feet of Your Lord and Master, and seek His Sanctuary.
This precious human body becomes fruitful,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਕੁਸਲੁ ਜੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜੀਉ ਕਰਨਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: soee kusal ju prabh jeeo karanaa |1|
lines.english: Take joy in whatever God does. ||1||
